description: Lente Tecnico: fuentes de datos, NFR, superficies frontend/backend, deep-dive de arquitectura y enablers.

checks.description: Data source, integration, or system ownership is not explicit in source or technology context.
checks.why: Sin fuente de datos ni ownership no se puede definir el source of truth.

checks.description: Performance, security, observability, or operational constraints are not explicit.
checks.why: Las NFR tecnicas condicionan arquitectura; nombrarlas sin definirlas no alcanza (ver IMP-021).

checks.description: Cross-cutting enablers are not explicit enough: implementation work that must be built in advance across frontend/backend or architecture surfaces must be tied to confirmed project functionality and boundary.
checks.why: Los enablers validos son trabajo concreto previo atado a funcionalidad confirmada.

checks.description: Frontend implementation surface is not explicit enough: affected screens, states, validations, copy, roles, or API binding needs are unclear.
checks.why: Mencionar una pantalla no dice sus estados, validaciones ni bindings: la contracara ausente dispara la pregunta.

checks.description: Backend implementation surface is not explicit enough: capabilities, integrations, rules, persistence, contracts, or failure behavior are unclear.
checks.why: Una integracion mencionada sin contratos ni comportamiento ante fallas es media verdad.

checks.description: Technology has insufficient input to perform repository, architecture, endpoint/event, source-of-truth, or risk analysis.
checks.why: Tecnologia no puede analizar arquitectura sin repos, source of truth ni diagramas.

checks.description: Authentication, permissions, or roles are named without the auth method, permission model, or role catalog.
checks.why: Mencionar auth/permiso/rol sin metodo de autenticacion, modelo de permisos ni catalogo de roles deja la superficie de acceso indefinida; la contracara ausente ancla la pregunta (IMP-117).
